source_excerpt: "Neither. He's a—a—a meat dog," said the girl.

dialogue_text: Oh! He's a curious animal and seems remarkably small, now that I look at him. No one would think of biting such a little thing, except a coward like me,
source_excerpt: "Oh! He's a curious animal and seems remarkably small, now that I look at him. No one would think of biting such a little thing, except a coward like me," continued the Lion sadly.
